title: centaurea urvillei subsp. urvillei
intro: Centaurea urvillei subsp. urvillei, also known as Cornflower, is a flowering plant species in the dandelion family that is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Cornflower include reducing fever, relieving menstrual cramps, and soothing skin irritations, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Cornflower can be prepared into various herbal products, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to address a range of health issues.
